microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, managing complex schedules, cross-team dependencies, and risk tradeoffs — including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Built and maintained technical execution roadmaps tying hardware and software feature delivery to milestones, tracking cross-team dependencies and communicating program status, risks, and priority tradeoffs to stakeholders at all org levels.

Guided decision-making on hardware-software integration tradeoffs by synthesizing risk signals across engineering teams and **presenting structured recommendations** to senior leadership, accelerating resolution of blockers and maintaining program momentum.

Scaled team leverage via an internal **AI-driven planning agent**, restructuring drill-scheduling workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase annual program capacity by 21% without additional headcount.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to intent-based YAML generation being added as a prioritized milestone in the next planning cycle.

Improved hardware and software documentation integrity by migrating to an AI-powered semantic search platform with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting engineer lookup time by 83%** and reducing friction across cross-functional delivery teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and reduced region launch time by 28% by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams with competing schedules and priorities.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a phased roadmap to automate the highest-impact execution paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility into automation gaps and enabling data-driven resource allocation decisions tied to launch program milestones.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives for a cross-functional robotics hardware team, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to maintain velocity against program milestones.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the hardware software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing integration risk during the scale manufacturing rollout.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved schedule adherence and resource allocation across field operations.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to target high-value service segments.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering actionable recommendations that tightened cost controls across the project portfolio.
